content: A multi-agent orchestrated pipeline can be structured to iteratively refine the hypothetical document generation step in HyDE RAG, turning a single-shot mock document creation into a dynamic multi-agent brainstorming process that produces more representative hypothetical embeddings. Each sequential agent in the pipeline expands, critiques, and refines the initial hypothetical document before embedding, which addresses the core limitation of single-agent HyDE where low-quality or off-topic mock documents hurt retrieval accuracy.
